Label: Coding Escalation
Coding Escalaition Meaning: Before Escalating, you must verify the NDC yourself first. Through www.aapc.com or Verify MR which Drug has been given to the Patient.
Coding Escalaition Line 1: Checked the medical record — confirmed the drug name and NDC of what was actually given to the patient.
Coding Escalaition Line 2: Confirmed the NDC is 11 digits with no dashes — and matches exactly what was submitted on the claim. CMS Box-24  & UB-04 FL-43-44
Coding Escalaition Line 3: Looked up the NDC-to-HCPCS crosswalk — confirmed the billed HCPCS/CPT does not match the drug administered or NDC Expired.
Coding Action: Now escalate to coding — share the NDC, the billed HCPCS/CPT, and the crosswalk result. Ask coding to assign the correct HCPCS/CPT code that matches the drug.
